meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Break Through Your Coding Plateau
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with basic apps. Learn how to master Claude Code and Antigravity to build production-grade software and accelerate your developer career.
content.answer_block: Break your plateau by transitioning from manual coding to AI-assisted architectural engineering. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you move from writing syntax to orchestrating complex features. This setup automates boilerplate, enforces design patterns, and allows you to focus on high-level logic, turning your student projects into professional-grade SaaS applications.
content.intro:
The screen glows, the cursor blinks, and you feel the familiar sting of a project stuck in 'tutorial hell.' You have the basics down, but as soon as you attempt a real-world application, the complexity collapses your progress. The gap between a student project and a production-ready SaaS feels like a chasm that manual coding simply cannot bridge.

But the rules of the game have changed. By mastering Claude Code and the Antigravity workflow, you aren't just writing code—you are orchestrating an AI agent to handle the heavy lifting of architecture and debugging. This isn't a shortcut; it is the new standard of software engineering. Let's bridge that gap and transform your workflow into a high-velocity development engine.

steps.title: Environment Synchronization
steps.description: Establish a baseline by ensuring your local environment is configured for agentic workflows. This step bridges the gap between your local file system and the Claude Code execution context.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and identify missing industry-standard configuration files for a scalable SaaS boilerplate.

steps.title: Architectural Blueprinting
steps.description: Define the scope of your application. Use Antigravity to generate a high-level system diagram that Claude Code can reference during implementation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a modular architecture plan for an authentication-heavy dashboard. Define the database schema and API endpoints.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review the architecture plan and suggest improvements for horizontal scalability.'

steps.title: Component Iteration
steps.description: Leverage the agent to build individual modules. Instead of writing code line-by-line, define the interface and let the agent handle the implementation details.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, reusable React component for a user-profile card with Tailwind CSS, following atomic design principles.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the user profile component based on the provided design specifications.'

steps.title: Automated Debugging Loops
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform recursive testing. Feed errors back into the agent to achieve autonomous resolution.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current build logs and identify potential race conditions in the authentication flow.

steps.title: Deployment Readiness Audit
steps.description: Perform a final quality check to ensure your code meets professional deployment standards before shipping.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Conduct a security and performance audit of the codebase. Flag any potential vulnerabilities or bottlenecks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Prepare a deployment checklist for this project based on standard Vercel/AWS production requirements.'

pro_tips: Always provide context files (READMEs or API docs) to Claude Code to prevent hallucinations in custom libraries.
Use Antigravity to generate 'TODO' comments in your code, then trigger Claude Code to resolve them sequentially.
Treat the Claude Code CLI as a pair programmer; ask it to explain its reasoning before it executes a destructive file operation.
Maintain a separate 'agent-context' folder in your repo to store project-wide style guides and architectural constraints.
Leverage the terminal integration to pipe error logs directly into Claude Code for instant, context-aware debugging.
content.next_steps: After completing this workflow, commit your code to a GitHub repository, document the agentic process you used in your README, and begin building a second feature using the same architectural pattern to solidify your mastery.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the toolkit to outpace traditional developers and build software that scales. Don't let your ideas stay in the draft folder. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
